title: Phippsia groenlandica
taxonomy: Phippsia groenlandica is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, commonly known as the carnation or pinks family. It belongs to the genus Phippsia, which is a group of Arctic plants. The genus Phippsia is further classified within the tribe Caryophylleae. Phippsia groenlandica is a small, succulent plant that thrives in Arctic regions. It is native to the Arctic tundra and is known for its ability to survive in extreme cold temperatures.
